ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – 30th April 2026, 02:00–04:00 IST
ham.body:
Hello Team,

Please be advised that the corporate VPN infrastructure will undergo routine maintenance on 30th April 2026 from 02:00 to 04:00 IST. During this window, all VPN connections will be temporarily unavailable. This maintenance is part of our quarterly security audit and will not affect any other network services.

Key points:
- Expected downtime: 2 hours
- No data loss or changes to user accounts
- No action required from users
- If you experience any connectivity issues outside this window, please contact IT support.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
IT Operations

spam.subject: Urgent: Your FedEx Package Missed Delivery – Pay Now to Avoid Extra Fees
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

We regret to inform you that your FedEx shipment (Tracking No: 1Z9X4B1234567890) was marked as "Missed Delivery" on 24th April 2026. To prevent your package from being returned and to avoid additional handling charges, you need to pay the missed delivery fee of INR 1,200 within the next 48 hours.

Please visit <URL> and enter the required details. Once the payment is confirmed, your package will be rescheduled for delivery.

If you do not pay the fee by 26th April 2026, the package will be returned to the sender and you will be billed for the return shipping costs.

Thank you for choosing FedEx. If you have any questions, call our customer support at 1800-123-456.

Best regards,
FedEx Delivery Team
